title: The Last Livestream
logline: A popular tech YouTuber is found dead mid–24-hour charity livestream after the stream cuts out at 2:47 AM and viewers capture a shadow in the doorway.

setting.primary_location: Soundproofed creator studio with adjacent control room
setting.timeframe: Overnight; stream goes offline at 2:47 AM

premise.cause_of_death: Lethal dose of a prescription stimulant mixed into an energy drink
premise.inciting_event: Charity livestream ends abruptly at 2:47 AM; screenshots show a shadow in the doorway

suspects.name: The Editor
suspects.role: Editor with access to the studio all night

suspects.name: The Ex-Business Partner
suspects.role: Former partner suing for $1.2M in stolen ad revenue

suspects.name: The Girlfriend
suspects.role: Brought the energy drinks earlier that evening

suspects.name: The Superfan Moderator
suspects.role: Discord moderator escalating threats in DMs

spatial_tool.concept: Floor plan of the studio + control room layout

trojan_horse.concept: DoorDash receipt timestamped 2:51 AM showing a suspect ordering food 4 minutes after the stream died
trojan_horse.purpose: Time constraint/alibi pressure that challenges the obvious suspect

tone.style: Tech-culture realism; fandom pressure; sponsor/corporate angles
